title: solanum nigrum subsp. miniatum
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. miniatum, also known as the small black nightshade or dwarf black nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum nigrum plant, a flowering plant in the nightshade family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Solanum nigrum subsp. miniatum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Solanum nigrum subsp. miniatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
